  • Overview

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AddBatchDialogFragment
    Dialog fragment that collects user input for creating a new incubation batch.
    AddIncubatorDialogFragment
    Dialog fragment used to create or edit an incubator record.
    Batch
     
    BatchAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying batch card summaries in a list.
    BatchAdapter.OnBatchClickListener
    Functional interface for handling batch item click events.
    BatchAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for displaying a batch card summary.
    BatchCardSummary
    Data transfer object containing summary information for a batch card display.
    BatchCardSummaryFormatter
    Utility class for formatting breed summaries used on batch cards.
    BatchDao
    Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Batch entity operations.
    BatchDetailFragment
    Fragment that displays detailed information about a single batch.
    BatchEggAggregate
    Projection that aggregates egg counts for a single batch.
    BatchListFragment
    Manages the list of incubation batches shown on the home screen.
    BatchRepository
    Abstraction for accessing and modifying Batch entities and related views.
    BatchRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for batch data access and operations.
    BatchViabilitySummary
    Data transfer object containing viability statistics for a batch.
    BatchViewModel
    ViewModel for managing batch data, sorting, and egg viability operations.
    BatchViewModel.SortOrder
    Enumeration defining available sort orders for batches.
    BatchWithEggGroups
    Room relation view that combines a Batch with its EggGroup records.
    BatchWithIncubator
    Database view that combines batch data with its associated incubator details.
    BulkCandlingDialogFragment
    Dialog fragment that applies bulk candling results to all egg groups in a batch.
    BulkCandlingGroupAdapter
    Adapter used to display egg groups and collect bulk candling input values.
    BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.OnInputFocusListener
    Listener notified when an input field should receive focus and show the keyboard.
    CandlingObservation
    Represents a candling observation recorded for a specific egg.
    CandlingObservationDao
    Provides database access methods for CandlingObservation entities.
    CandlingObservationRepository
    Abstraction for accessing and modifying CandlingObservation entities.
    CandlingObservationRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for candling observation data access and operations.
    DatabaseModule
    Hilt module that provides the Room database and DAO dependencies.
    DatePickerFragment
    Dialog fragment that displays a date picker.
    Egg
     
    EggDao
    Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Egg entity operations.
    EggDetailFragment
    Fragment intended to display details for a single egg.
    EggGroup
     
    EggGroupDao
    Room Data Access Object (DAO) for EggGroup entity operations.
    EggGroupRepository
    Abstraction for accessing and modifying EggGroup entities.
    EggGroupRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for egg group data access and operations.
    EggGroupViewModel
    ViewModel for managing egg group data and operations.
    EggGroupWithEggs
    Room relation object combining an egg group with its associated eggs.
    EggRepository
    Abstraction for accessing and modifying Egg entities and related aggregate data.
    EggRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for egg data access and operations.
    GoogleAuthRepository
    Repository interface for Google authentication operations.
    GoogleAuthRepository.SignInRequiredException
    Exception thrown when sign-in is required but not completed.
    GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for Google authentication operations.
    Incubator
     
    IncubatorAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying incubator items in a list.
    IncubatorAdapter.OnIncubatorClickListener
    Functional interface for handling incubator item click events.
    IncubatorAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for displaying an incubator item.
    IncubatorDao
    Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Incubator entity operations.
    IncubatorRepository
    Abstraction for accessing and modifying Incubator entities.
    IncubatorRepositoryImpl
    Repository implementation for incubator data access and operations.
    IncubatorsFragment
    Fragment that displays the list of active incubators.
    IncubatorViewModel
    ViewModel for managing incubator data and operations.
    MainActivity
    Main activity hosting the application's navigation graph and top-level UI.
    NextMilestoneHelper
    Utility class for computing the next incubation milestone and its date.
    NextMilestoneSummary
    Simple value object that describes the next incubation milestone.
    PipPipDatabase
    Main Room database for the Pip Pip Hooray application.
    PipPipDatabase.Converters
    Type converters used by Room for unsupported Java time types.
    PipPipHoorayApplication
    Initializes (in the PipPipHoorayApplication.onCreate() method) application-level resources that cannot be handled with Hilt dependency injection.
    RepositoryModule
    Dagger module that provides bindings for repository implementations.
    SettingsFragment
    Preference screen for application settings and account actions.
    SignInFragment
    Fragment that handles user authentication with Google Sign-In.
    SignInViewModel
    ViewModel for managing Google authentication and user sign-in/sign-out operations.
